_comment: First-draft Marshall Fit exercise library. Exercises are filtered to the gym equipment catalog and organized around the workout template movement patterns. Source references identify online/local resources used to seed names, targets, and equipment categories; coaching text is original draft guidance.

online_resources.name: NASM Exercise Library
online_resources.notes: Referenced for common exercise names, body-part classifications, difficulty language, and equipment categories.

online_resources.name: ACE Exercise Library
online_resources.notes: Referenced for common exercise names, target body-part groupings, and accessible bodyweight/free-weight variations.

online_resources.name: ExRx Exercise Directory
online_resources.notes: Referenced for movement-family coverage and muscle/action categorization across presses, pulls, curls, extensions, squats, hinges, and accessory lifts.

online_resources.name: Marshall Fit Equipment Catalog
online_resources.notes: Local source of truth for equipment IDs and stations available in the gym.

movement_patterns.description: Incline chest pressing patterns biased toward upper chest.
Chest fly, dip, push-up, and pump/accessory patterns.
Pull-ups, chin-ups, pulldowns, and straight-down lat patterns.
Back/rear-delt accessory pulls and upper-back finishers.
Shoulder isolation and rear/lateral delt movements.
Curl variations for biceps, brachialis, and forearms.
Squat and quad-dominant compound lower-body patterns.
Deadlift, RDL, hip thrust, and hinge-dominant patterns.
Hamstring curl, Nordic, and single-leg hinge accessories.
Glute, hip, calf, lunge, and mobility-oriented lower-body accessories.
Core options available in the gym for future template expansion.

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.setup: Flat bench inside rack with safeties set just below chest height.
coaching_notes: Use a stable arch, packed shoulders, and a controlled touch point on lower-to-mid chest.

exercises.name: Paused Barbell Bench Press
exercises.setup: Flat rack bench with a 1-2 second pause on the chest.
coaching_notes: Good strength variation when load is slightly reduced.

exercises.name: Close-Grip Barbell Bench Press
exercises.setup: Flat rack bench with hands just inside shoulder width.
coaching_notes: Keep wrists stacked and elbows tucked without forcing an extreme narrow grip.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bench Press
exercises.setup: Flat FID bench with dumbbells started from thighs or floor.

exercises.name: Single-Arm Dumbbell Bench Press
exercises.setup: Flat bench; press one dumbbell while the opposite hand stays free or holds a second dumbbell at lockout.
coaching_notes: Anti-rotation demand is higher; use less load than a two-arm press.

exercises.name: Alternating Dumbbell Bench Press
exercises.setup: Hold both dumbbells over chest; alternate reps while the non-working arm stays locked out or paused low.

exercises.name: Neutral-Grip Dumbbell Bench Press
exercises.setup: Flat bench with palms facing each other.
coaching_notes: Often friendlier for shoulders than a flared grip.

exercises.name: Barbell Floor Press
exercises.setup: Set J-cups low enough to unrack from the floor or use spotter arms.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Floor Press
exercises.setup: Lie on floor; pause upper arms lightly on floor each rep.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Bench Press
exercises.setup: Flat bench aligned under guided Smith bar.
coaching_notes: Useful for stable loading when training alone.

exercises.name: Smith Close-Grip Bench Press
exercises.setup: Flat bench under Smith bar, hands just inside shoulder width.

exercises.name: Decline Smith Machine Press
exercises.setup: Decline FID bench under guided Smith bar if bench angle and rack clearance permit.

exercises.name: Push-Up
exercises.setup: Hands on floor under shoulders; body in a straight plank.

exercises.name: Incline Push-Up
exercises.setup: Hands elevated on bench or rack crossmember.

exercises.name: Decline Push-Up
exercises.setup: Feet elevated on bench.
coaching_notes: Treat as an upper-chest/bodyweight press variation.

exercises.name: Weighted Push-Up
exercises.setup: Plate or band loading added only after strong standard push-ups.

exercises.name: Band-Resisted Push-Up
exercises.setup: Band across upper back and held under hands.

exercises.name: Suspension-Strap Push-Up
exercises.setup: Hands in straps; walk feet back to choose difficulty.
coaching_notes: Instability makes this more advanced than a floor push-up.

exercises.name: Rack Dip - Chest Bias
exercises.setup: Use rack dip handles; lean torso slightly forward.

exercises.name: Weighted Rack Dip - Chest Bias
exercises.setup: Weighted dip belt/plate loading if available; otherwise use controlled tempo bodyweight dips.

exercises.name: Incline Barbell Bench Press
exercises.setup: FID bench at a low-to-moderate incline inside rack.

exercises.name: Paused Incline Barbell Press
exercises.setup: Incline rack press with a brief pause near upper chest.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.setup: FID bench around 15-45 degrees.

exercises.name: Single-Arm Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.setup: Press one dumbbell at a time on incline bench.

exercises.name: Neutral-Grip Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.setup: Incline bench; palms face each other.

exercises.name: Alternating Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.setup: Alternate incline dumbbell reps while maintaining shoulder position.

exercises.name: Incline Smith Machine Press
exercises.setup: Incline bench centered under Smith bar.

exercises.name: Low-Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.setup: FID bench at roughly the lowest incline setting to split flat and incline emphasis.

exercises.name: Standing Barbell Overhead Press
exercises.setup: Bar starts from front rack at shoulder height.

exercises.name: Seated Dumbbell Shoulder Press
exercises.setup: Upright or high-incline FID bench.

exercises.name: Single-Arm Dumbbell Shoulder Press
exercises.setup: Standing or seated; press one dumbbell overhead.

exercises.name: Arnold Press
exercises.setup: Seated or standing dumbbell press with rotation through the rep.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Overhead Press
exercises.setup: Seated or standing under Smith path with safe bar travel.

exercises.name: Landmine Press
exercises.setup: Bar anchored in landmine; press from shoulder in an arcing path.

exercises.name: Half-Kneeling Landmine Press
exercises.setup: Half-kneeling stance with bar in opposite-side hand or same-side hand.

exercises.name: Pike Push-Up
exercises.setup: Hips high, torso angled downward; press head toward floor.

exercises.name: Feet-Elevated Pike Push-Up
exercises.setup: Feet on bench, hips stacked higher than shoulders.

exercises.name: Standing Cable Fly
exercises.setup: Dual cables set around chest height; step forward between columns.

exercises.name: High-to-Low Cable Fly
exercises.setup: Cable pulleys set high; sweep handles down and together.

exercises.name: Low-to-High Cable Fly
exercises.setup: Cable pulleys set low; sweep handles upward toward upper chest/eye line.

exercises.name: Single-Arm Cable Fly
exercises.setup: One cable column; staggered stance to resist rotation.

exercises.name: Flat Bench Cable Fly
exercises.setup: Flat bench centered between low cables.

exercises.name: Incline Cable Fly
exercises.setup: Incline bench centered between low cables.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Fly
exercises.setup: Flat bench; soft elbows with controlled stretch.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Fly
exercises.setup: Low-to-moderate incline bench.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Squeeze Press
exercises.setup: Press dumbbells together while pressing from flat bench.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Pullover - Chest Bias
exercises.setup: Upper back on bench or lying lengthwise; keep ribs controlled and elbows softly bent.

exercises.name: Medicine-Ball Power Pushdown
exercises.setup: Slam/push ball down forcefully from chest or overhead depending on space and ball type.
coaching_notes: Use only with a slam-safe ball and clear floor area.

exercises.name: Cable Triceps Pushdown
exercises.setup: High pulley with straight bar/V-bar attachment.

exercises.name: Rope Triceps Pushdown
exercises.setup: High pulley with rope; separate rope ends at bottom.

exercises.name: Single-Arm Cable Triceps Pushdown
exercises.setup: High pulley with single handle or no handle.

exercises.name: Reverse-Grip Cable Pushdown
exercises.setup: High pulley; palms-up grip on bar/handle.

exercises.name: Overhead Rope Triceps Extension
exercises.setup: Cable set low or high behind body; elbows point forward/up.

exercises.name: Single-Arm Overhead Cable Triceps Extension
exercises.setup: Single handle or cuff; arm overhead with controlled elbow flexion.

exercises.name: Cross-Body Cable Triceps Extension
exercises.setup: Cable around shoulder height; extend across body.

exercises.name: EZ-Bar Skull Crusher
exercises.setup: EZ bar on flat bench; lower toward forehead or behind head.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Skull Crusher
exercises.setup: Flat or incline bench with neutral-grip dumbbells.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Overhead Triceps Extension
exercises.setup: One dumbbell held with both hands overhead, seated or standing.

exercises.name: Single-Arm Dumbbell Overhead Triceps Extension
exercises.setup: One dumbbell overhead; keep upper arm near ear.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Triceps Kickback
exercises.setup: Hip-hinged or bench-supported; extend elbow behind body.

exercises.name: Cable Triceps Kickback
exercises.setup: Low cable with single handle or no handle.

exercises.name: Bench Dip
exercises.setup: Hands on bench behind hips; feet on floor.

exercises.name: Band Triceps Pushdown
exercises.setup: Band anchored high on rack.

exercises.name: Barbell Bent-Over Row
exercises.setup: Hip hinge with barbell; row toward lower ribs.

exercises.name: Pendlay Row
exercises.setup: Bar starts dead on floor each rep; torso near parallel.

exercises.name: Underhand Barbell Row
exercises.setup: Supinated grip barbell row toward waist.

exercises.name: Two-Dumbbell Bent-Over Row
exercises.setup: Hinge and row both dumbbells toward hips/ribs.

exercises.name: Single-Arm Dumbbell Row
exercises.setup: One hand and/or knee supported on bench.

exercises.name: Chest-Supported Dumbbell Row
exercises.setup: Incline bench chest support; row dumbbells without torso swing.

exercises.name: Incline Prone Dumbbell Row
exercises.setup: Prone on incline bench, elbows out or tucked based on target.

exercises.name: Seated Cable Row
exercises.setup: Use low cable/linked sides if needed with seated position on floor or bench.

exercises.name: Standing Cable Row
exercises.setup: Cable at lower-to-mid height; athletic stance.

exercises.name: Single-Arm Cable Row
exercises.setup: One cable column; row toward hip or ribs.

exercises.name: Wide-Grip Cable Row
exercises.setup: Use wide/MAG or straight attachment; elbows travel wider.

exercises.name: Chest-Supported Cable Row
exercises.setup: Use Pritchett pad as chest support facing cable.

exercises.name: Landmine T-Bar Row
exercises.setup: Bar in landmine with V-bar/handle near sleeve.

exercises.name: Chest-Supported Landmine Row
exercises.setup: Pritchett pad supports chest while rowing landmine bar.

exercises.name: Meadows Row
exercises.setup: Stand perpendicular to landmine and row sleeve end.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Row
exercises.setup: Guided bar row from hip-hinged stance.

exercises.name: Inverted Row
exercises.setup: Bar in rack at waist height; body under bar.

exercises.name: Suspension-Strap Row
exercises.setup: Lean back holding straps; walk feet forward to increase difficulty.

exercises.name: Pull-Up
exercises.setup: Pronated grip on pull-up bar.

exercises.name: Chin-Up
exercises.setup: Supinated grip on pull-up bar.

exercises.name: Neutral-Grip Pull-Up
exercises.setup: Neutral handles on multi-grip bar.

exercises.name: Wide-Grip Pull-Up
exercises.setup: Wide pronated grip if shoulders tolerate it.

exercises.name: Band-Assisted Pull-Up
exercises.setup: Loop band over pull-up bar and place foot/knee in band.

exercises.name: Weighted Pull-Up
exercises.setup: Add external load only after strong bodyweight reps.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.setup: Use high cable with pulldown attachment; kneel or sit with thighs anchored as available.

exercises.name: Neutral-Grip Lat Pulldown
exercises.setup: High cable with neutral MAG/V handle.

exercises.name: Wide-Grip Lat Pulldown
exercises.setup: High cable with wide attachment.

exercises.name: Single-Arm Lat Pulldown
exercises.setup: Single high cable; kneel or sit and pull elbow toward hip.

exercises.name: Straight-Arm Cable Pulldown
exercises.setup: High cable; keep arms mostly straight and sweep to thighs.

exercises.name: Cable Pullover
exercises.setup: High cable pullover with slight hip hinge.

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.setup: High cable rope pulled toward nose/forehead with elbows high.

exercises.name: Cable Rear-Delt Row
exercises.setup: Cable around chest height; elbows travel out wide.

exercises.name: Reverse Cable Fly
exercises.setup: Dual cables crossed or single-column variation.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Reverse Fly
exercises.setup: Bent-over or chest-supported on incline bench.

exercises.name: Prone Y Raise
exercises.setup: Prone incline bench; raise arms in Y shape with very light dumbbells.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
exercises.setup: Stand tall, raise dumbbells out to sides.

exercises.name: Cable Lateral Raise
exercises.setup: Low cable handle; raise across body or from side.

exercises.name: Leaning Cable Lateral Raise
exercises.setup: Hold rack/cable column and lean slightly away from low cable.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Front Raise
exercises.setup: Raise dumbbells forward to shoulder height.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Shrug
exercises.setup: Hold dumbbells at sides and elevate shoulders without rolling.

exercises.name: Barbell Shrug
exercises.setup: Bar in hands in front; shrug straight up.

exercises.name: EZ-Bar Curl
exercises.setup: Standing curl with EZ bar.

exercises.name: Barbell Curl
exercises.setup: Straight bar curl; keep ribs down and elbows mostly fixed.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Curl
exercises.setup: Standing or seated alternating/simultaneous curls.

exercises.name: Alternating Dumbbell Curl
exercises.setup: Alternate sides while maintaining posture.

exercises.name: Hammer Curl
exercises.setup: Neutral-grip dumbbell curl.

exercises.name: Cross-Body Hammer Curl
exercises.setup: Curl dumbbell toward opposite pec/shoulder.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Curl
exercises.setup: Lie back on incline bench; arms hang behind torso.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Spider Curl
exercises.setup: Chest-supported on incline bench facing down.

exercises.name: Isolator Preacher Curl
exercises.setup: Use Bulletproof Isolator/preacher setup if configured safely.

exercises.name: Cable Curl
exercises.setup: Low cable with straight/EZ/handle attachment.

exercises.name: Rope Hammer Curl
exercises.setup: Low cable rope curl with neutral grip.

exercises.name: Single-Arm Cable Curl
exercises.setup: Low cable single handle.

exercises.name: High Cable Curl
exercises.setup: Cable(s) set high; curl toward temples in a front-double-biceps position.

exercises.name: Band Curl
exercises.setup: Stand on band or anchor low to rack.

exercises.name: Suspension-Strap Biceps Curl
exercises.setup: Lean back holding straps; curl body toward handles.

exercises.name: Barbell Back Squat
exercises.setup: Rack bar on upper back with safeties set below bottom position.

exercises.name: Barbell Front Squat
exercises.setup: Front rack or cross-arm grip from rack.

exercises.name: Box Squat
exercises.setup: Squat to controlled box/bench height without relaxing posture.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Squat
exercises.setup: Guided Smith bar squat with foot placement adjusted to natural bar path.

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
exercises.setup: Hold kettlebell or dumbbell at chest.

exercises.name: Double-Kettlebell Front Squat
exercises.setup: Two kettlebells in front-rack position.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Front Squat
exercises.setup: Pair of dumbbells at shoulders/front rack.

exercises.name: Landmine Squat
exercises.setup: Hold landmine sleeve at chest and squat.

exercises.name: Landmine Hack Squat
exercises.setup: Bar behind shoulder with landmine anchored; squat in the arcing path.

exercises.name: ATG Split Squat
exercises.setup: Front foot elevated/wedged as needed; long knee-over-toe split squat through controlled range.

exercises.name: Bodyweight Squat
exercises.setup: Squat to comfortable depth with heels grounded.

exercises.name: Jump Squat
exercises.setup: Explosive bodyweight squat jump; land softly.

exercises.name: Barbell Romanian Deadlift
exercises.setup: Start from standing; hinge to mid-shin while maintaining neutral spine.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Romanian Deadlift
exercises.setup: Dumbbells held in front or at sides; hinge under control.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Romanian Deadlift
exercises.setup: Guided Smith bar with hips moving back under stable foot position.

exercises.name: Single-Leg Romanian Deadlift
exercises.setup: Contralateral or ipsilateral dumbbell/kettlebell loading.

exercises.name: Barbell Deadlift
exercises.setup: Pull from floor with plates; reset each rep.

exercises.name: Sumo Deadlift
exercises.setup: Wide stance and inside hand position.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Deadlift
exercises.setup: Kettlebell between feet; hinge/squat hybrid.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Swing
exercises.setup: Ballistic hip hinge; do not squat the swing.

exercises.name: Barbell Hip Thrust
exercises.setup: Upper back supported by bench/hip-thrust attachment; bar over hips.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Hip Thrust
exercises.setup: Bench behind body and Smith bar over hips.

exercises.name: Single-Leg Hip Thrust
exercises.setup: Upper back supported; one foot on floor, optional dumbbell on hip.

exercises.name: Glute Bridge
exercises.setup: Supine on floor; bridge hips until ribs, hips, knees align.

exercises.name: Barbell Good Morning
exercises.setup: Bar on back; soft knees; hinge with strict control.

exercises.name: Isolator Leg Extension
exercises.setup: Configure Bulletproof Isolator leg developer for leg extension.

exercises.name: Single-Leg Isolator Leg Extension
exercises.setup: Single-leg setup on isolator with controlled lockout.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.setup: Rear foot on bench or leg roller; optional dumbbells.

exercises.name: Front-Foot-Elevated Split Squat
exercises.setup: Front foot elevated on platform/wedge; controlled knee travel.

exercises.name: Step-Up
exercises.setup: Step onto stable bench/platform; control the descent.

exercises.name: Walking Lunge
exercises.setup: Alternating forward steps with optional dumbbells.

exercises.name: Reverse Lunge
exercises.setup: Step backward into lunge; drive through front foot.

exercises.name: Forward Lunge
exercises.setup: Step forward into lunge; push back to start.

exercises.name: Lateral Lunge
exercises.setup: Step to side, sit into working hip while trail leg stays long.

exercises.name: Cossack Squat
exercises.setup: Side-to-side deep squat pattern with one leg extended.

exercises.name: Assisted Sissy Squat
exercises.setup: Hold rack upright or band assistance while knees travel forward and torso leans back.

exercises.name: Cyclist Squat
exercises.setup: Heels elevated on squat board/wedge with narrow stance.

exercises.name: Isolator Lying Leg Curl
exercises.setup: Configure Bulletproof Isolator for lying leg curl.

exercises.name: Isolator Seated Leg Curl
exercises.setup: Configure isolator/leg developer for seated curl if supported.

exercises.name: Single-Leg Isolator Leg Curl
exercises.setup: Single-leg curl with controlled eccentric.

exercises.name: Bodyweight Slider Leg Curl
exercises.setup: Use socks/sliders on smooth floor if available; bridge hips and curl heels in.

exercises.name: Banded Leg Curl
exercises.setup: Band anchored low on rack; prone or standing curl.

exercises.name: Assisted Nordic Hamstring Lower
exercises.setup: Anchor ankles under roller; use hands or band for assistance.

exercises.name: Cable Pull-Through
exercises.setup: Low cable rope between legs; hinge and stand tall.

exercises.name: Cable Glute Kickback
exercises.setup: Low cable ankle/handle setup; kick leg back without lumbar extension.

exercises.name: Cable Hip Abduction
exercises.setup: Low cable ankle/handle setup; move leg out to side.

exercises.name: Banded Lateral Walk
exercises.setup: Band around ankles/knees; side-step under control.

exercises.name: Banded Monster Walk
exercises.setup: Band around legs; diagonal steps forward/back.

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.setup: Use ATG platform edge and dumbbells or Smith bar.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Calf Raise
exercises.setup: Balls of feet on platform under Smith bar.

exercises.name: Single-Leg Calf Raise
exercises.setup: Hold rack for balance; optional dumbbell in free hand.

exercises.name: Hanging Knee Raise
exercises.setup: Hang from pull-up bar and raise knees under control.

exercises.name: Hanging Leg Raise
exercises.setup: Hang and raise straight or mostly straight legs.

exercises.name: Ab Roller Rollout
exercises.setup: Kneeling rollout; brace ribs down and avoid lumbar sag.

exercises.name: Plank
exercises.setup: Forearms on floor; hold straight line.

exercises.name: Side Plank
exercises.setup: Elbow under shoulder, hips lifted.

exercises.name: Dead Bug
exercises.setup: Supine contralateral arm/leg reaches with low back controlled.

exercises.name: Cable Pallof Press
exercises.setup: Cable at chest height from side; press handle straight out resisting rotation.

exercises.name: Landmine Rotation
exercises.setup: Arc landmine bar side-to-side with hips/ribs controlled.
